effect.name: Channel Depth BG
effect.author: ComplexSoftwares (BG version by RainbowHype)
effect.description: Change depth of single color channels (R,G,B). Background version.

parameter.name: Offset
parameter.description: Offset of the source color, to adjust lighting

parameter.name: Apply to Background
parameter.description: Toggles whether the effect applies to the current object or the background behind it.
